items.title: Diesel sees biggest monthly fall in 26 years. What's happening to fuel prices?
items.summary: When the US-Israel war with Iran began, fuel costs jumped, but they are now plummeting as hope of lasting peace grows.

items.title: EPF contributions above 1800/month to be voluntary
items.summary: Employees Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) has mandated a 12% PF contribution on wages up to Rs 15,000 monthly for its eight crore members. Contributions beyond this statutory...
